title: BlossomCraft Staff Textures
description: Retextures Minecraft Entities To BlossomCraft Staff
body:
# INFORMATION
This texture pack retextures different entities to look like BlossomCraft staff! This only contains the different staff that a player can get a good idea of what to make it into. For example, BLAMEFULOPOSSUM_, they would be an opossum.

## ENTITIES RETEXTURED
### ANIMAL/STAFF/DESCRIPTION
- Jellie Cat - Deeraee - Changed the gray fur to the pink and brown hair in her pfp
- Armadillo - BLAMEFULOPOSSUM_ - an opossum... not much else... name reads most of it...
- Dolphin - ClayManatee - changes the color
- Pigs - Pigki - Changes the eye color to be the purple like in his
- Bread - _mangobread_ - makes it a mango
- Bottle o' Enchanting - CuppaRo - coffee cup ;)
- Frogs - CrybabybackRibs - Makes them look like storm troopers
- Witch - cherpi23 - retextures the witch to look like cherpi's pfp
- Zombie - averagenooblol - makes the zombie look like a roblox noob (not a staff member)
- Arrow - LegionOfBullets - Makes the arrow look like a bullet
- Lead - IronicAtom - makes the lead look like a pokeball
- Panda - BritishBear - makes it look like a brown bear
- Cake (item) - MissDahlia - Looks like a cheese cake
- Iron Golem - Chpsy - makes it look like the mandelorian from star wars
- Goat - TheGoatHyato - make it look like his Minecraft skin
- Crossbow - TopHatDuck0o0 - Makes the crossbow look like a shotgun

More textures will come soon! Let me know what I should add!

## EXTRA INFO
BlossomCraft was founded by LegionOfBullets and Chpsy in 2020. **This texture pack is not officially made by LegionOfBullets or Chpsy.**
